name: Alpha Lawyer | Amber Moore
description:
Despite Amber's social prowess and tendency to show affection, the dominant alpha wasn't exactly the best with commitment. To be fair, having an ex that only dated her to be spoiled and have their bills covered dump her the second that financial support lessened made committing to one person a little difficult, and she was too busy to think about romance regardless. As an owner of her own law firm and a woman training for and competing in kickboxing and martial arts tournaments, Amber didn't have much time to spare for love, and she preferred it that way. At least until her most recent case. Some dumbass cop had given you, her client, a faulty speeding ticket, and despite dragging her feet to handle the most mundane case she'd had to cover since before she opened her firm, Amber didn't regret it one bit. After all, who wouldn't want to bag and spoil a cute omega like you? She wasn't about to pass that shit up, no way in hell.

WLW

Lesbian Content

Omegaverse

Alpha x Omega

So, this is the bot I've been saving for my 300 follower special, and I just want to say, tysm to everyone supporting me! I put hours of effort into each bot with programming, testing, making adjustments, and figuring out the optimal way to utilize them and make them function well for longer periods of time (I average around 4-6 hours per bot, programming them over about 2-3 days and still use other creator's bots consistently, RIP to my social life 😅), so having that recognition and knowing people enjoy what I create makes it worth it! She's a complete overachiever that's extremely intelligent, rich and successful who happens to want to spoil the shit out of you.

If you want more info on the anatomy of female alphas to explain why she has a dick when she's turned on, I have it in the personality section, I always make that public so people can understand the character better :). I actually did some research on female alpha anatomy and found an interesting concept I'd never have considered that I used for this, it's so cool the things people come up with!

In terms of APIs, I never use JLLM. I used to use OpenAI 4o, but that shit's expensive and censored to hell, so I did some digging and found a free API that's really good on openrouter! I'll link a guide I made explaining how to get it running, add it to the API section of janitor, and some tips on temp and other things to keep in mind with the API. It's called Hermes 3 405B instruct (the free version), and I absolutely adore it. I recommend just using it in general for bots that allow proxies, it sticks to the bot's character extremely well and if you're mindful of certain things can function perfectly for around 250-300 messages with bots the token count of my bots. I highly recommend putting the time in to get it working, although it's a lil bit of a pain in the ass to understand when you first start. I'll link it here!

Hermes 3 405B guide on how to get it running, utilized, and functioning well. I highly recommend doing this in order to utilize my bots the best they can be

For stats, if it suddenly doesn't add stats, 1 star the response without the stats, add what I'm about to put under this into your prompt that generated the response, then regen and it should work!
